textByHash.fc26ecab6c45cde81aef1d61b3b1ba39b545e380: That depends on who is asking...
textByHash.50658e053b35344dc5dfa5a5a3725bb359f32790: I see. As you can see, this is a dangerous place to be.
textByHash.8e1de82328f11b8c8c122ecbffcae8895fdd73c8: Karam, 10th squad, Royal Guard. High Assassin at your service.
textByHash.36e21faf9ef0b82274a268631f33b632f5995b7b: I am thinking of a way to free my friends. In the meantime, I am helping those who further my cause.
textByHash.4172273cafd313e0cf3b77d6ecd2c84141696493: I have been gifted by Zooknock, our squad mage. I have saved his life on a number of occasions.
textByHash.1f671fb512b553296cbcd346a37b0594f7328059: Your best chance is to hide in this grass, human.
textByHash.36758b5da5167966c8b72b2f2aec049ddff045d0: My squad and I are to remain on this island in secret. The monkeys think we are trying to break our friends out of the jail, but we are just biding our time.
textByHash.1eb11f38ef0477734594d2056b33585f4f652a1c: I'm hunting for maniacal monkeys that escaped Glough's airship laboratory!
textByHash.77654a2c00bf35fac2741dc340ea0bdd06ed335c: Not yet, I'm still perfecting my strategy... I'll let you know as soon as I find a way.
